meta.author: CLAUDE_WEB
meta.nature: RESOLVED merge of RRI_BASE_SPEC_v1_0_draft.md + RRI_AUDIT_DISPOSITION_v1_1.md + RRI_ADDENDUM_SEMANTIC_INDEX_v1_1.md (diffs applied; this file is the single normative input for CC-alpha)
meta.conflict_rule: If this JSON conflicts with the MD sources or with real code, HALT and report. Do not silently pick a side.
claim_ceiling: Only section 'measured_baseline' is measurement; everything else is design.
Temperature is an ordinal budget cap, not a measurement of true need.
This spec does not claim divergence can be made impossible; only reduced, detected, contained.
Layer-3 (semantic index) guarantees retrieval only; it never participates in truth, identity, or state transitions.
meta.adjudication_status: All items in pending_adjudications are PROPOSED_AWAITING_TAKA. Treat them as working assumptions; flag any implementation decision that would change materially if an item is rejected.

live_functions.role: mints RREQ/RINT/RSIG; sole writer of rri_records.jsonl (680 lines, untracked)

wired_unentered_validators.cause: DE-0231 deliberately deferred candidate GENERATION (:8005) to a separate slice
wired_unentered_validators.implication: This spec restores the missing generation wing; first energization of the 8 validators is EXPECTED to fail broadly and must be treated as breakage-list collection, not design failure.

known_defects.text: admission_request.detect literal-match only; semantically obvious admissions pass through
admission_request.py and residual_update.py are live but imported by zero tests
preflight_gate absent on autonomous path (select_and_create); stand-in is approval gate CHG-0128 (= Taka)
rri_records.jsonl is a single untracked file

demonstrated_capability.summary: Question-splitting (externally-answerable vs machine-only), blockage verdicts, decision packets to human — all demonstrated, but Claude was the outer loop (DE-0151 BOOTSTRAP_ORCHESTRATED_BY_CLAUDE). Missing: the container and cross-turn accumulation (DE-0159 REASONING_ORPHANED).

architecture.rthread_status: RTHREAD is an aggregate ID minted at contact + a projection over its events. It is NOT a stored fat record and NOT a first-class store parallel to the event store or EGL.
architecture.egl_status: EGL remains the knowledge/evidence ledger, referenced from events by ID (unchanged).

unit.definition: 1 contact event = 1 RTHREAD. Unit is the fact that the user contacted 2DER with intent (discrete, countable, timestamped, immutable after the fact) — NOT the soft textual content (which drifts).
rules: Conversation turns do not create new RTHREADs (same funding source).
Divergence into a different intent => THREAD_SPLIT event creating child RTHREAD(s); question totals conserved across parent+children.

bookkeeping_direction.debit_uses: investigations/questions/tasks drawn from it across multiple accounts

request_thread.sole_writer: rri/request_thread.py (new module; only sanctioned writer of the RTHREAD event stream)

event_types.note: admission-checked against state_machine.transitions; illegal advance rejected
the human door; enumeration must be exhaustive or event is rejected
semantic-index candidates become links only via this event

guards: suspense_balance==0 OR remainder explicitly disposed to OPEN_GAP
THREAD_ACCEPTED recorded (human, with exhaustive residual enumeration)
EGL consult passed (EGL wins on conflict)

state_machine.no_timeout: AWAITING_HUMAN has no expiry (abandonment tolerance is a primary constraint). No auto-close, no auto-nag. Provide a derived waiting-inventory view (threads with idle days); waking is always human-initiated and must be cheap.

question_ledger.unit: 1 question, immutable id Q-<8hex> minted at generation; id survives rephrasing
question_ledger.conservation_law: raised_total == resolved + open_gap + rejected(reason_code required) + merged(target required). Must hold at EVERY state transition; violation => halt (fail-closed).
question_ledger.merge_split_rule: Merge/split are transactions, never deletions: dispose old ids (MERGED_INTO), raise new; totals conserved. Axis split conserves counts (parent == sum(children)).

suspense_account.name: UNCLASSIFIED
suspense_account.rule: unclassifiable questions may rest here; balance always visible; must be 0 or explicitly disposed at RESOLVED. Looseness is permitted temporarily, never permanently.

rules: OPEN_GAP is an exit with delivery duty, not a parking lot.
Re-raising a declined question requires flag re_raised_after_decline.
No mechanical cap on gap balance (value judgment stays with LLM/human); gap-rate per thread and per account is a first-class statistic surfaced to human.

question_ledger.rejected_rule: reason is a classification code + memo (free text). Rejection rate per account is a first-class statistic. Laundering is not blocked mechanically but is always conspicuous.

journal_entry.is: an event (layer 1). No separate journal store.

llm: which account a question belongs to

stages.name: saturation
stages.rule: saturated == zero new axes in last k hops; saturated OR budget exhausted -> exit loop; else -> s2

stages.name: gap_cutout
stages.path: open_gaps -> DS -> human (AWAITING_HUMAN); reply -> s1 (temperature recomputed)

stages.name: implementation_survey
stages.rule: recursive reapplication of s1-s5 with target 'this repo' instead of 'the world'; no dedicated mechanism

temperature.nature: ordinal upper bound on investigation hops per request; NOT effort prediction; leaving budget unspent is success-compatible

adjust.action: route to human (value judgment is a human door)

temperature.hop_definition: 1 hop = 1 bounded work unit: 1 acquisition OR 1 :8005 classification call, each with a token cap and wall-clock cap. Overrun is cut-and-redraw, never extended (bimodal convergence finding).
temperature.branch_decay: per-branch independent: remaining = temperature - hop_distance; 0 => prune branch (prevents exponential blowup)
temperature.cost_model: estimated_effort ~= sum(branch remaining budgets) * mean hop cost; hop_cost stamped on every INVESTIGATION_HOP from day one so statistics later replace guesses

chart_of_accounts.source: MINED, never imagined. Initial chart = deterministic clustering over DE ledger (491) + rri_records (680) — both are records of intent-bearing contact — then LLM naming by 3-seed consensus (>=2/3 label overlap).
chart_of_accounts.rejected_alternative: Claude pre-generating accounts by imagining cases (precedent: the fabricated A-E stage table was replaced by measurement).
chart_of_accounts.status: DERIVED / regenerable / versioned; never SoR. Account NAME is a label on an id, not identity itself (C3 analogue).
chart_of_accounts.promotion: New account proposals live as sub-labels under UNCLASSIFIED; promote to formal account only after recurrence in N independent threads; promotions/demotions are transactions.
chart_of_accounts.explosion_valve: Hard cap on account count. New-account proposal requires recorded 'why memo cannot express this'. Small stable chart + rich memo.

mining_spec_order.features: deterministic only: ID-reference co-occurrence, repos touched, request_type, blockage, DE band, progression transitions. Free text is NOT a feature (prose Jaccard 0.51).
mining_spec_order.clustering: deterministic: fixed seed, fixed tie-breaking, byte-identical regeneration
acceptance: negative control: shuffled input yields no stable clusters (a miner confident on noise is a vacuous oracle)
cross-seed cluster agreement measured and recorded

chart_of_accounts.self_reference_note: Classifying DEs with a chart mined from DEs does not contaminate as long as the chart stays DERIVED and classification results never write back into DE bodies.

accumulation.store: EGL (no new DB — dual-ledger family F). Purpose doctrine: 'priority determines subject; do not read everything'.
accumulation.freshness_sealing: sealed by caller from registry; emitter self-report forbidden (retention_class failed twice before — do not make it a third)

auto_update.contradiction_rule: If an update negates a premise of a decided RTHREAD: record supersede -> identify affected RTHREADs -> force them to AWAITING_HUMAN -> notify human. This is the core of abandonment tolerance. Silent accumulation over stale decisions is harmful.
auto_update.authority: auto-update is human-triggerless writing; budget caps and REQUIRES_APPROVAL-family gates must be fixed before enabling; usage (calls/tokens/wall) recorded

levels.L3: raw/full volume (ledger reference only; never returned)

presentation.boundary_criterion: 'Would Taka be unable to choose without knowing this?' — information that does not affect choice drops to L2 or below.
presentation.item_cap: per-turn cap applies to L0+L1 (see invariant T2); axis-tree depth from account hierarchy provides the natural skeleton for levels

divergence_ledger.vocabulary: DE prose uses '乖離 (divergence from expected semantics)'; 'hallucination' only as parenthesized historical alias. Vocabulary decides the schema: 'hallucination' fills cause fields with model traits; 'divergence' fills them with generation-time conditions.
divergence_ledger.measurable_object: conditional empirical distribution P(divergence | conditions); model internals untouchable (API-only), and that is fine

record.sealing: cause fields are generation-time observable conditions only, sealed by caller; model-trait speculation forbidden

writers: machine oracles (repo check, ledger check, tests, conservation law) — proven: caught 5 fabricated commit hashes
human intuition (existing tsutsuki-log merges into the SAME schema)

traps.name: detection_coverage_bias
traps.rule: no-oracle conditions record UNRESOLVED_NO_ORACLE, never zero. Statistics otherwise mark the most dangerous places as safest.

traps.name: denominator
traps.rule: condition stamps go on EVERY generation, not only divergent ones; otherwise you have frequency, not probability.

divergence_ledger.condition_table: the 5 hypothesized conditions (no grounding / format pressure / seam compression / self-report / role-grounding mismatch) are HYPOTHESES stored in the ledger, not rules; conditions become conditions by surviving data

improvement_loop.phase2: DIV records link countermeasure_ref (a DE); recurrence rate per condition computed by machine (generalization of live failure_memory: 109 fires / 27 blocks)
improvement_loop.phase3_boundary: promoting a condition to a standing gate is TAKA-ONLY adjudication. Auto-promotion == self-improvement claim, which v0 mainline explicitly disclaims.

semantic_index.why: Literal matching already lost in measurement: DE-0451 pass-through; prior_consult under literal matching returns systematic misses indistinguishable from true absence; DS bind_context ('that thing') cannot be grep.
semantic_index.role: layer 3: retrieval flashlight. The ledger is the map. Confirmed links (LINK_CONFIRMED events) accumulate as the asset; the index is a consumable.
semantic_index.flow: index -> k candidates -> LLM identity judgment -> LINK_CONFIRMED event in ledger (dated, reasoned, attributed, reversible). Confirmed links take precedence over fresh index results.

insertion_order.gain: the 'never repeat an investigation' promise stops being empty

prohibitions: embeddings as MINING_SPEC features (breaks byte-identical acceptance)
index as SoR or index-only information
index miss as proof of absence — record UNRESOLVED_INDEX_MISS; the index can say 'not found', never 'does not exist'

implementation.base: existing vLLM host + a Qwen-family embedding model (verify GPU headroom by measurement)
implementation.store: one local vector store, derived, fully rebuildable from ledger, one-way ledger->index
implementation.update: async on event append; index lag/loss degrades to retrieval misses only; layer 1 never blocks on layer 3

global_disciplines.rule: Trust-relevant fields (ids, disposals, transitions, freshness, divergence conditions) are sealed by the caller from registries; LLM/downstream self-report forbidden.
Value/direction judgments (no ground truth) may go to LLM; factual judgments (ground truth exists) machine-only; stop/saturation decisions machine-only.
global_disciplines.basis: the Taka-signature rule applied to LLMs

global_disciplines.rule: Seams pass content verbatim with count reconciliation; compression/summarization across seams forbidden.
UNRESOLVED is a first-class output of every LLM stage; never apply format pressure that forces fabricated specifics.
Derived artifacts (chart, condition table, index, projections) are DERIVED/regenerable; never SoR.
Build on the existing 8-term vocabulary; invent no new design vocabulary.
The only exit toward the human is DS.

global.rule: every test below must once be shown to turn red when its target is broken (mutation check) before adoption
machine sealing of trust fields is itself tested

tests.rule: candidate space shrinks each turn; growth requires recorded expansion_trigger
per-turn items returned to human capped; overflow rolls to open_gaps; breach fail-closed
human-bound payload = unresolved items + current narrowing only; never full volume
prior_consult before any investigation; unconsulted investigation rejected
writes toward human via DS only
confirmation goes through EGL consult; EGL wins conflicts
DW tickets only from DISPATCHABLE
turn_count cap forces AWAITING_HUMAN
temperature is a cap; implementations forcing budget exhaustion rejected
saturation decided by machine; LLM 'enough' never accepted
LLM-A and LLM-B are separate calls/prompts
A's axis count == B's input axis count
per-branch decay mandatory; undecayed recursion rejected
conservation law holds at every transition; mismatch halts
disposals limited to 4 types with required reason/target
merge conserves totals
split conserves totals
RESOLVED requires suspense 0 or explicit disposal
accumulation append-only; existing lines sha256-stable
premise-negating update forces affected RTHREAD to AWAITING_HUMAN
human default payload is L0+L1; L3 leakage is a violation
accounts promote by recurrence only
new account requires 'memo cannot express this' record
memo never used in conservation math
1 contact event = 1 RTHREAD
embedding scores never in branch conditions
full index wipe leaves all functions reconstructible from ledger
UNRESOLVED accepted as valid output
divergence cause fields are generation-time observable conditions only
no-oracle conditions record UNRESOLVED_NO_ORACLE, not zero
condition stamps on every generation
human-intuition detections share the machine schema
RRI direct writes to user surface detected (mechanized T5)
the 8 validators actually execute in the RESOLVED guard (WIRED_UNENTERED regression detector)
positive control at each rollout stage: deliberately drop one item; conservation must go red
RTHREAD projection regenerates byte-identical from events; direct projection writes violate
state transitions guarded as STATE_ADVANCED admissions; illegal advances rejected
RESOLVED rejected while unpresented OPEN_GAPs exist
re-raise of declined question only with re_raised_after_decline flag
THREAD_ACCEPTED must enumerate all residual gaps; non-enumerated residual rejects the event
hops are bounded (token+time caps); unbounded hop implementations rejected
DIV conditions with countermeasure_ref carry machine-computed recurrence counters
condition->gate promotion requires a human adjudication event
index wipe + full functional tests pass (CI, not annual)
static check: index API callers limited to retrieval paths
index miss recorded as UNRESOLVED_INDEX_MISS; 'no match' never passed downstream as fact
confirmed links outrank fresh index results
index update failure/lag never blocks event append

preconditions: star3 closed (E1 commit -> death#6 seam-side fix -> conformance probe) OR cw() rolled back; never half-migrated
denylist boundary DE cut (request-refinement candidate generation is NOT the forbidden 'alternative generation' of DE-0160/0163; ban limited to HBB/AFE failure-detection engines per DE-0112)
mainline transition DE cut (v0 mainline achieved at star3; request-thread becomes next mainline)

stages.what: conservation law inside one RTHREAD, totals only (no accounts)
accounts introduced; LLM assigns, machine balances
suspense settlement discipline in RESOLVED guard

rollout.each_stage: run T35 positive control; first energization of the 8 validators treated as breakage-list collection (broad failure is the expected, healthy outcome)
rollout.termination_condition: One real request travels SOFT -> DISPATCHABLE with the 8 validators actually executing, human-returned items within L0+L1, and the conservation law holding at every transition. Spec completion is NOT success (anti-tributary clause).

pending_adjudications.status: PROPOSED_AWAITING_TAKA (24 base + 5 disposition + 4 addendum = 33 items; see MD sources for full text)

material_for_implementation.proposal: RTHREAD = projection over event stream (no fat record)
RESOLVED = annotated closing (human acceptance with exhaustive residual enumeration)
OPEN_GAP delivery-duty + statistics; no mechanical balance cap; no timeout
improvement loop machine through phase2; gate promotion human-only
MINING_SPEC separate deliverable with 3 acceptance conditions
embedding model co-hosted on vLLM; one local derived store
